subcodes.first_line: O ye twin brilliant stars in the horizon of the love of God! The tidings of that spiritual celebration and heavenly feast have brought joy and gladness to all souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو نجم باهر افق محبت الله خبر جشن روحانی و بزم رحمانی سبب سرور و حبور نفوس
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @music and singing
